defaultSeo.title: Awais Nasir | Senior Software Engineer
defaultSeo.description: Awais Nasir is a Senior Software Engineer, experienced in creating beautiful and functional websites and web applications.

heroData.paragraph: Building reliable, scalable systems that solve real problems and deliver lasting value.

aboutItems: Senior Software Engineer based in Doha, Qatar, open to onsite, hybrid, and remote opportunities globally.
8+ years of experience delivering production-grade platforms across startups, product companies, and enterprise environments spanning AI, workforce management, real estate, and cultural institutions.
Deep understanding of the full software development lifecycle, from early architecture decisions and team alignment through to production deployment and post-launch operations.
I architect for the long term, take ownership end-to-end, and bridge the gap between technical depth and business outcomes.
Outside of work, I enjoy playing Chess and Cricket, watching movies, and reading books.
aboutData.resumeParagraph: You can check my resume in the link below.

projects.name: Memberships Portal
projects.summary: Led the architecture and delivery of a centralized Memberships Platform for QC+ and Qatar Museums, migrating 100K+ members from legacy systems and fully digitizing corporate, individual, and event-based memberships. The platform unified RBAC-driven admin workflows, membership approvals, ticketing, and payment integrations, and now serves as the core system for cultural event access and monetization across all museums.

projects.name: Daleel Aqar
projects.summary: Engaged as a Software Consultant to advise and deliver key architectural guidance for Daleel Aqar, a large-scale real estate platform enabling property buying, selling, and rentals. Led end-to-end technical consulting across planning, architecture, and deployment, structured within a monorepo to ensure scalability, maintainability, and rapid team onboarding. Architected the platform to be fully compliant with WCAG accessibility guidelines, achieving the official LevelAccess certification. Established cloud-based DevOps practices including containerized services, automated pipelines, monitoring, IAM roles management, and secure infrastructure.

projects.name: Authentic Influencers
projects.summary: Designed and delivered the architecture for a platform connecting Instagram and TikTok influencers with brands, enabling seamless pitching, negotiations, and deal finalization. Implemented a frontend integrated with a headless CMS backend to provide dynamic content management and flexible editorial workflows. Architected cloud-based microservices for authentication, content delivery, and notifications, ensuring scalability and security. Established API-driven integrations between the CMS and backend services, enabling smooth data exchange across the platform. Mentored the development team on engineering best practices, modular design, and cloud deployment strategies, leading the project from initial architecture through to successful full deployment.

projects.name: Performance Reporting
projects.summary: Engineered a user-friendly reporting app that provides stakeholders with clear insights into Afiniti software performance across client environments, using key metrics to improve results

projects.name: WFM
projects.summary: A large-scale enterprise workforce management platform built for contact centers across multiple global clients. The platform handled the full complexity of managing agent workforces at scale, from day-to-day scheduling visibility to long-term capacity planning. Each client deployment was fully configurable to their operational structure, supporting distinct roles, permissions, organizational hierarchies, and regional requirements including timezone-aware access and scheduling across geographies. Core capabilities included agent scheduling across daily, weekly, and monthly views, structured time-off request workflows for agents, supervisors, and managers, and the assignment of agents to workforce groups, skills, and planning groups based on each client's service delivery model. Beyond scheduling, the platform incorporated statistical forecasting to predict future workforce demand based on historical data, helping operations teams plan ahead rather than react. A suite of live and historical reporting views gave management the broader visibility they needed to make informed decisions about capacity, performance, and resource allocation. The platform served real contact center operations globally, where reliability, accuracy, and configurability were not optional but critical to daily business continuity.
keyFeatures: Work Plans and Work Plan Rotations of Agents
ETL (export,transpose,load) based Module to load and sync the historical data from Afiniti dbs to Client Environments

projects.name: Visenya
projects.summary: Designed and delivered an internal platform that automated data pipeline creation and management for AI and Data Integration teams, significantly reducing the manual effort involved in setting up and maintaining complex data workflows. Worked in close collaboration with AI researchers and data engineers on a daily basis, translating their operational needs into platform features that made their workflows faster and more reliable. A key part of the platform was an abstraction layer built on top of an industry-standard workflow orchestration engine, simplifying how teams defined, triggered, and monitored data pipelines without needing deep infrastructure knowledge. The platform became a core productivity tool for internal teams, compressing pipeline setup time and enabling data and AI teams to focus on their actual work rather than infrastructure management.

projects.name: WFM Historical Connectors
projects.summary: Architected an ETL application to export, transpose, and load historical data from Afiniti databases into client environments, streamlining data synchronization and integration. Fueled product user adoption rate by customizing the app functionality to meet the unique requirements, configurations, and environments of diverse clients. Ran complex data migration initiatives, leveraging advanced SQL expertise and a deep understanding of database transactions to transfer large datasets while maintaining data integrity.

projects.name: Db Utility
projects.summary: Developed a utility service for Afiniti's internal teams which enabled the smooth deployment of database schemas, tables, stored procedures, functions, views, and triggers on both production and staging servers. Managed and safeguarded database server data through robust backup and log tracking functionality, ensuring data protection and preventing system issues.

projects.name: Aduro
projects.summary: Developed a hybrid app using Ionic1 to interface with hardware controllers which enabled remote management of devices such as DHW systems, hoppers, and boilers:
